pipelines.name: reid_Camera_01
pipelines.pipeline: rtspsrc location=rtsp://mediaserver:8554/Camera_01 latency=200 ! rtph264depay ! h264parse ! avdec_h264 ! videoconvert ! videorate ! video/x-raw,format=BGR,framerate=10/1 ! gvapython class=PostDecodeTimestampCapture function=processFrame module=/home/pipeline-server/user_scripts/gvapython/sscape/sscape_adapter.py name=timesync ! gvadetect model=/home/pipeline-server/models/intel/person-detection-retail-0013/FP32/person-detection-retail-0013.xml model-proc=/home/pipeline-server/models/object_detection/person/person-detection-retail-0013.json threshold=0.85 name=detection ! gvainference model=/home/pipeline-server/models/intel/person-reidentification-retail-0277/FP32/person-reidentification-retail-0277.xml inference-region=roi-list object-class=person name=personreid ! gvadetect model=/home/pipeline-server/models/intel/face-detection-retail-0004/FP32/face-detection-retail-0004.xml model-proc=/home/pipeline-server/models/object_detection/person/face-detection-retail-0004.json inference-region=roi-list object-class=person threshold=0.75 name=facedetection ! gvainference model=/home/pipeline-server/models/intel/face-reidentification-retail-0095/FP32/face-reidentification-retail-0095.xml model-proc=/home/pipeline-server/models/object_detection/person/face-reidentification-retail-0095.json inference-region=roi-list object-class=face ! gvatrack tracking-type=short-term-imageless ! gvametaconvert add-tensor-data=true name=metaconvert ! gvapython class=PostInferenceDataPublish function=processFrame module=/home/pipeline-server/user_scripts/gvapython/sscape/sscape_adapter.py name=datapublisher ! gvametapublish name=destination ! appsink sync=true
